name: zillow-clone-2024
brief_text: Real-estate marketplace for a regional brokerage. Buyers browse listings on a map, save favorites, and book viewings. Agents get a CRM to manage leads and update listing status. Needs Stripe for premium agent subscriptions. They sent a 14-page PDF, mostly screenshots of Zillow.
outcome_notes: Shipped +4d. PostGIS geo-queries took longer than estimated; map clustering at scale was the bottleneck.

name: delivery-track-2024
brief_text: Last-mile delivery tracking for a courier startup. Live driver location on a map, ETA to customer, proof-of-delivery photo upload, and a dispatcher console to reassign jobs. Realtime is the whole point.
outcome_notes: Shipped on time. Reused a WS gateway pattern from a prior project; realtime was smoother than feared.

name: fintech-jr-2024
brief_text: Personal-finance app for young adults. Connect a bank via Plaid, auto-categorize transactions, set budgets, and see a spending dashboard. KYC required for the savings feature. Security and compliance are non-negotiable.
outcome_notes: Shipped +9d. Plaid webhook edge cases + KYC vendor integration were badly underestimated. Payments/compliance always run long.

name: ledgerlite-2024
brief_text: Lightweight bookkeeping tool for freelancers. Log income/expenses, attach receipts, generate quarterly tax summaries, export CSV. No bank sync needed — manual entry is fine.
outcome_notes: Shipped early. Simple CRUD-heavy app; no integrations kept it predictable.

name: budgetbuddy-2023
brief_text: Shared household budgeting. Couples track a joint budget, split categories, and get a monthly email summary. Mobile-first web app.
outcome_notes: Shipped on time. Email summaries via SES were quick.

name: redfin-tools-2025
brief_text: Add-on tools for a real-estate site: neighborhood ratings, school scores overlay on the map, and a mortgage calculator widget. Embeds into an existing site.
outcome_notes: Shipped +2d. Embeddable widget cross-origin styling was fiddly.

name: propspot-mvp-2025
brief_text: MVP property-listing marketplace for short-term rentals. Hosts list places, guests pay a deposit to reserve. Needs payments and a basic messaging inbox between host and guest.
outcome_notes: Shipped on time. Stripe deposit holds reused from an earlier marketplace.

name: agent-crm-v2-2023
brief_text: CRM rebuild for an insurance agency. Contact management, email sequences, and a renewals reminder system. Migrate data from their old spreadsheet mess.
outcome_notes: Shipped on time. Spreadsheet import was the riskiest piece; budgeted for it and it paid off.

name: shopflow-pos-2024
brief_text: Point-of-sale + inventory for a small chain of brick-and-mortar shops. Cashier checkout on a tablet, barcode scan, live inventory across stores, and an end-of-day reconciliation report. Works offline if wifi drops.
outcome_notes: Shipped +5d. Offline-sync conflict resolution was the time sink; offline-first always adds complexity.

name: fanzone-worldcup-2025
brief_text: Fan companion app for a stadium during a big tournament. Live match info, in-seat food ordering, wayfinding to gates/restrooms, and crowd-density alerts. Huge traffic spikes on match days.
outcome_notes: Shipped +6d. Load testing for match-day spikes + autoscaling tuning took longer than planned.
